selectionHighlightBackground.$description: Color for regions with the same content as the selection

inactiveSelectionBackground.$description: Color of the selection in an inactive editor

wordHighlightBackground.$description: Background color of a symbol during read-access

wordHighlightStrongBackground.$description: Background color of a symbol during write-access

findMatchHighlightBackground.$description: Color of the other search matches

hoverHighlightBackground.$description: Highlight below the word for which a hover is shown

lineHighlightBackground.$description: Background color for the highlight of line at the cursor position

activeForeground.$description: Color of the active editor line number

background.$description: Background color of the editor gutter

deletedBackground.$description: Editor gutter background color for lines that are deleted

foldingControlForeground.$description: Color of the folding control in the editor gutter

border.$description: Color of the overview ruler border

findMatchForeground.$description: Overview ruler marker color for find matches

rangeHighlightForeground.$description: Overview ruler marker color for highlighted ranges

selectionHighlightForeground.$description: Overview ruler marker color for selection highlights

currentContentForeground.$description: Current overview ruler foreground for inline merge conflicts

incomingContentForeground.$description: Incoming overview ruler foreground for inline merge conflicts

commonContentForeground.$description: Common ancestor overview ruler foreground for inline merge conflicts

modifiedForeground.$description: Overview ruler marker color for modified content

addedForeground.$description: Overview ruler marker color for added content

deletedForeground.$description: Overview ruler marker color for deleted content

errorForeground.$description: Overview ruler marker color for errors

warningForeground.$description: Overview ruler marker color for warnings

infoForeground.$description: Overview ruler marker color for infos

foreground.$description: Foreground color of error squiggles in the editor

Color of whitespace characters in the editor
